requirement_topic.en: Bhutan Grid Connection - IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 不丹并网——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 不丹併網——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Bhutan's electricity sector is regulated by the Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA), with Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) acting as the principal utility and distribution grid operator. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, project approval is expected to focus on utility interconnection, anti-islanding, voltage and frequency protection, and compatibility with Bhutan's 50 Hz, 230/400 V low-voltage supply. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 photovoltaic utility-interface evidence should be prepared for BEA, BPC, and project-owner review. Bhutan is a Himalayan, hydro-dominant system with more than 99% hydro generation and interconnection to India, so project-specific protection coordination and grid-code settings should be confirmed with BPC before commissioning.
summary.zh: 不丹电力行业由不丹电力管理局（BEA）监管，不丹电力公司（BPC）是主要公用事业和配电网运营方。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，项目审批预计重点关注公用电网接入、防孤岛、电压和频率保护，以及与不丹50 Hz、230/400 V低压供电的兼容性。应为BEA、BPC和项目业主审查准备IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727光伏公用电网接口证据。不丹属于喜马拉雅山区、以水电为主且水电占比超过99%的电力系统，并与印度电网互联，因此并网前应与BPC确认项目特定的保护配合和电网代码参数。
summary.zht: 不丹電力行業由不丹電力管理局（BEA）監管，不丹電力公司（BPC）是主要公用事業和配電網運營方。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，項目審批預計重點關注公用電網接入、防孤島、電壓和頻率保護，以及與不丹50 Hz、230/400 V低壓供電的相容性。應為BEA、BPC和項目業主審查準備IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727光伏公用電網介面證據。不丹屬於喜馬拉雅山區、以水電為主且水電占比超過99%的電力系統，並與印度電網互聯，因此併網前應與BPC確認項目特定的保護配合和電網代碼參數。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 - Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters - Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 - Photovoltaic systems - Characteristics of the utility interface
Bhutan Electricity Authority - electricity-sector regulatory requirements and licensing framework
Bhutan Power Corporation - project-level grid-connection and distribution network conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power stations, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding reports. These documents are based on China grid conditions and do not automatically satisfy BEA, BPC, or project-owner requirements in Bhutan. The critical parameter distinction is that Bhutan uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its nominal low-voltage supply is 230/400 V, while China uses 220/380 V under GB/T 156.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括光伏发电站GB/T 19964-2024、并网逆变器技术规范NB/T 32004、逆变器技术要求GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛报告。上述文件基于中国电网条件，不会自动满足不丹BEA、BPC或项目业主要求。关键参数差异在于：不丹与中国同为50 Hz频率，但不丹低压标称供电为230/400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括光伏發電站GB/T 19964-2024、併網逆變器技術規範NB/T 32004、逆變器技術要求GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島報告。上述文件基於中國電網條件，不會自動滿足不丹BEA、BPC或項目業主要求。關鍵參數差異在於：不丹與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但不丹低壓標稱供電為230/400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 - 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid-connection documents should be treated as domestic baseline evidence only. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the exact inverter model or family, document firmware protection thresholds for Bhutan's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, and confirm BPC project-specific protection settings. Do not state that Bhutan voltage matches China: the frequency is the same at 50 Hz, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For Himalayan sites, verify altitude-related thermal derating, creepage and clearance assumptions, and enclosure performance.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件应仅作为国内基准证据处理。出口商应为具体逆变器型号或系列准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口报告，记录针对不丹230/400 V、50 Hz电网的固件保护阈值，并确认BPC项目特定保护参数。不得声称不丹电压与中国相同：两者频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于喜马拉雅场址，还应核查高海拔相关热降额、爬电距离和电气间隙假设，以及外壳性能。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件應僅作為國內基準證據處理。出口商應為具體逆變器型號或系列準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面報告，記錄針對不丹230/400 V、50 Hz電網的韌體保護閾值，並確認BPC項目特定保護參數。不得聲稱不丹電壓與中國相同：兩者頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於喜馬拉雅場址，還應核查高海拔相關熱降額、爬電距離和電氣間隙假設，以及外殼性能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for any BPC-connected solar PV project where BEA, BPC, project owner, lender, or EPC technical review requires grid-interface and anti-islanding evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-connection baselines but is not automatically accepted for Bhutan BEA/BPC project approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021 reports as non-transferable baseline evidence for Bhutan. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and validate firmware against Bhutan's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before BPC connection review. Confirm current BEA rules and BPC project-specific protection settings directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021报告视为不能自动转移至不丹的基准证据。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并在BPC并网审查前按不丹230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证固件。出货或调试前，请直接确认现行BEA规则和BPC项目特定保护参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021報告視為不能自動轉移至不丹的基準證據。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並在BPC併網審查前按不丹230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體。出貨或調試前，請直接確認現行BEA規則和BPC項目特定保護參數。

requirement_topic.en: Bhutan Project Approval - BEA / BPC Technical Review and High-Altitude Site Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: 不丹项目审批——BEA / BPC技术审查及高海拔场址条件
requirement_topic.zht: 不丹項目審批——BEA / BPC技術審查及高海拔場址條件

summary.en: Bhutan solar PV projects should be reviewed against the applicable BEA regulatory framework, BPC interconnection conditions, and project-owner technical specifications. The market is small, hydro-dominant, mountainous, and connected with India, so equipment acceptance is often project-specific rather than a simple national label check. Inverter submissions should include model identification, IEC safety and grid-interface reports, firmware setting sheets, protection coordination data, site altitude and ambient-temperature derating evidence, and installation/commissioning documentation acceptable to the EPC, owner, BPC, and BEA where applicable.
summary.zh: 不丹太阳能光伏项目应依据适用的BEA监管框架、BPC接入条件和项目业主技术规格进行审查。该市场规模较小、以水电为主、地形多山且与印度互联，因此设备接受通常具有项目特定性，而不是简单的全国标签核查。逆变器提交资料应包括型号识别、IEC安全和电网接口报告、固件参数表、保护配合数据、现场海拔和环境温度降额证据，以及EPC、业主、BPC和适用时BEA可接受的安装及调试文件。
summary.zht: 不丹太陽能光伏項目應依據適用的BEA監管框架、BPC接入條件和項目業主技術規格進行審查。該市場規模較小、以水電為主、地形多山且與印度互聯，因此設備接受通常具有項目特定性，而不是簡單的全國標籤核查。逆變器提交資料應包括型號識別、IEC安全和電網介面報告、韌體參數表、保護配合數據、現場海拔和環境溫度降額證據，以及EPC、業主、BPC和適用時BEA可接受的安裝及調試文件。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan Electricity Authority - regulatory oversight for electricity supply and power-sector approvals
Bhutan Power Corporation - grid-connection, distribution network, metering, and commissioning requirements
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 - commonly expected grid-interface evidence for utility-interconnected PV inverters
IEC 62109-1/-2 - commonly expected inverter safety evidence

summary.en: Chinese domestic distributed PV approvals and grid-connection documentation are designed for China grid operators and Chinese voltage settings. They can support a technical file, but they do not replace Bhutan project review by BEA, BPC, the EPC, or the owner. China-side factory configuration, labels, manuals, and test reports should be reviewed for Bhutan-specific language, altitude, protection settings, and 230/400 V grid parameters.
summary.zh: 中国国内分布式光伏审批和并网文件是面向中国电网运营方及中国电压参数设计的。它们可以作为技术文件的支持材料，但不能替代不丹BEA、BPC、EPC或业主的项目审查。应核查中国侧出厂配置、标签、手册和测试报告是否覆盖不丹特定语言、海拔、保护参数和230/400 V电网参数。
summary.zht: 中國國內分散式光伏審批和併網文件是面向中國電網運營方及中國電壓參數設計的。它們可以作為技術文件的支持材料，但不能替代不丹BEA、BPC、EPC或業主的項目審查。應核查中國側出廠配置、標籤、手冊和測試報告是否覆蓋不丹特定語言、海拔、保護參數和230/400 V電網參數。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 - 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic inverter dossier may omit Bhutan project details that matter in review, including BPC interconnection settings, 230/400 V firmware validation, high-altitude thermal derating, site-specific protection coordination, and owner-required IEC evidence. Prepare a Bhutan-specific technical submittal instead of relying on Chinese certification alone. For large or sensitive projects, confirm whether India-interconnection or owner procurement standards add additional ride-through, power-quality, metering, or SCADA requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内逆变器资料包可能缺少不丹项目审查关注的内容，包括BPC接入参数、230/400 V固件验证、高海拔热降额、场址特定保护配合及业主要求的IEC证据。应准备不丹特定技术提交资料，而不是仅依赖中国认证。对于大型或敏感项目，应确认印度互联或业主采购标准是否增加低电压穿越、电能质量、计量或SCADA要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內逆變器資料包可能缺少不丹項目審查關注的內容，包括BPC接入參數、230/400 V韌體驗證、高海拔熱降額、場址特定保護配合及業主要求的IEC證據。應準備不丹特定技術提交資料，而不是僅依賴中國認證。對於大型或敏感項目，應確認印度互聯或業主採購標準是否增加低電壓穿越、電能品質、計量或SCADA要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but normally mandatory in practice for BPC grid connection, BEA-regulated activities, and owner/EPC technical acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic approvals are not transferable to Bhutan project approval and do not prove Bhutan site suitability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China domestic PV inverter dossier as a complete Bhutan project submittal. Add BPC connection settings, Bhutan 230/400 V at 50 Hz firmware validation, high-altitude derating evidence, and the IEC reports requested by the owner or EPC. Confirm BEA and BPC review expectations before committing the inverter model to a Bhutan project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国国内光伏逆变器资料包作为完整的不丹项目提交资料。请补充BPC接入参数、不丹230/400 V 50 Hz固件验证、高海拔降额证据，以及业主或EPC要求的IEC报告。在将逆变器型号用于不丹项目前，请确认BEA和BPC审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國國內光伏逆變器資料包作為完整的不丹項目提交資料。請補充BPC接入參數、不丹230/400 V 50 Hz韌體驗證、高海拔降額證據，以及業主或EPC要求的IEC報告。在將逆變器型號用於不丹項目前，請確認BEA和BPC審查要求。
